overview.minides: India's first dedicated 7-seat mass-market electric SUV — built on INGLO, with a coast-to-coast triple 12.3-inch screen setup, Harman Kardon Dolby Atmos, and 679 km claimed range.
overview.description: Launched on 27 November 2025, the Mahindra XEV 9S is India's first dedicated 7-seater mass-market electric SUV, built on the INGLO born-EV platform. Available in 4 trims (Pack One Above, Pack Two Above, Pack Three, Pack Three Above) across 3 battery packs (59 kWh / 70 kWh / 79 kWh), all with RWD. The 59 kWh produces 228 hp (521 km ARAI), the 70 kWh produces 241 hp (600 km), and the 79 kWh produces 282 hp (679 km). All variants share a coast-to-coast triple 12.3-inch screen setup, panoramic sunroof, 150-litre frunk, dual-zone auto AC, and 6 airbags. Pack Two Above adds Harman Kardon 16-speaker Dolby Atmos, ventilated front seats, and alloy wheels. Pack Three adds Level 2 ADAS, powered co-driver seat, boss mode, rear seat ventilation, and 7 airbags. 180 kW DC fast charging enables 20–80% in 20 minutes on the 79 kWh pack. Bookings opened 14 January 2026; deliveries began 23 January 2026.

dimensions.bootSpace: 390 Litres (3rd row up) / 780 Litres (3rd row folded) + 150 L frunk

variants.name: Pack One Above (79 kWh)
keyFeatures: 180 kW DC Fast Charge (20–80% in 20 min)

variants.name: Pack Two Above (70 kWh)
keyFeatures: Harman Kardon 16-Speaker Dolby Atmos (Standard from Pack Two)

variants.name: Pack Two Above (79 kWh)
keyFeatures: 282 hp + 679 km Range + Harman Kardon Audio

variants.name: Pack Three Above (79 kWh)
keyFeatures: Custom Drive Mode (Powertrain + Suspension + Steering tuning)
